security.title: Security
security.description: Manage authentication, access controls, and compliance settings for your workspace.
security.inviteLinksDesc: Allow members to invite others via a shared link.
security.approvedDomainsDesc: Automatically grant access to users who sign up with an approved email domain.
security.authGoogleDesc: Allow members to sign in with their Google account.
security.authPasskeyDesc: Allow members to sign in with their email address and a passkey.
security.authSamlDesc: Single sign-on and directory sync for enterprise identity providers.
security.permissionsDesc: Control who can perform administrative actions across your workspace.
security.thirdPartyReviewDesc: Require admin approval before members can install third-party OAuth applications.
security.reducePersonalInfo: Reduce personal info from support integrations
security.reducePersonalInfoDesc: Minimize the personal data shared with third-party support tools.
security.preventGuestsAgentsDesc: Restrict guest accounts from accessing AI agent features.
security.aiTelemetryDesc: Share anonymized usage data to help improve AI features.
security.agentWebSearchDesc: Allow Linear Agent to search the web when resolving issues.
security.mcpServersDesc: Allow members to connect external MCP servers to Linear Agent.
security.hipaaDesc: HIPAA Business Associate Agreements (BAA) are available on the Enterprise plan. Upgrade to enable HIPAA-compliant data handling and sign a BAA with Anthropic.
